agency.name: NY Dept. of Environmental Conservation (DEC)
agency.feesNote: Licenses valid Sep 1–Aug 31. Tags required for deer, bear, turkey (sold separately).

seasons.dates: No bear season in this unit
No bear season in this unit
No bear season in this unit

agency.name: Texas Parks and Wildlife Department
agency.feesNote: Licenses valid date of purchase–Aug 31. $5 online fee applies.

agency.name: Colorado Parks and Wildlife
agency.feesNote: Habitat Stamp ($12.76) required ages 18-64. Draw app fee: $8.93 res / $11.49 non-res.

agency.name: Alabama Dept. of Conservation & Natural Resources
agency.feesNote: Licenses valid Aug 1–Jul 31. Additional turkey and deer tags required separately.

agency.name: Wisconsin Dept. of Natural Resources
agency.feesNote: Licenses valid Apr 1–Mar 31. Purchase via GoWild (gowild.wi.gov).

agency.name: Alaska Dept. of Fish & Game
agency.feesNote: Big game tags required in addition to license. Non-residents must hire a licensed guide for brown bear, Dall sheep & mountain goat.
